assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends Regular channel instead of Stable or Extended, stating 'Use Regular channel for your production training cluster' and explaining why not to use Stable or Extended channels.

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response includes specific gcloud commands with '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' and explains that this 'allows critical control plane security patches while preventing any node disruption during your training campaign.'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response sets a specific narrow maintenance window on Sunday mornings (06:00-10:00Z weekly) with the gcloud command specifying 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU' and notes it should be 'during training gaps (early Sunday morning)'.

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response creates dedicated node pools - 'h100-training-pool' with specific GPU configurations and labels, and separately mentions 'preprocessing-spot' pool for non-critical workloads, clearly separating training from other workloads.

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' for the H100 training node pool and includes a 'Post-Training Upgrade Process' section detailing manual upgrade procedures during maintenance windows.

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response includes specific checkpoint configuration with 'terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 86400 # 24 hours for checkpointing', creates a dedicated checkpoint storage PVC, and mentions 'Extended terminationGracePeriodSeconds (24h) for checkpointing' in the summary.

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: The response includes GPU driver validation steps in the operational runbook ('Check GPU driver version compatibility') and explicitly states in the post-training upgrade process to 'Test upgrade in staging first' and 'Validate GPU drivers and RDMA after staging upgrade'.

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response mentions GPUDirect-TCPX support requirements with a specific cluster version ('--cluster-version 1.31.3-gke.1146000 # Ensure GPUDirect-TCPX support') and includes RDMA connectivity validation commands in the operational procedures.
